Prompt Name: Generate release contents from messy inputs
Purpose: Generate draft release contents table from messy Jira tickets, feature notes, Git commits, and support feedback for DeskPilot 2.4 release changes.
Input Sources: Jira Tickets; Feature Notes; Git Commits; Support Feedback
Notes: First reusable prompt. Supports release discovery and triage.

Purpose: Identify knowledge base articles that may need to be created, updated, deferred, or validated based on the generated release contents.
Notes: Used to convert documentation impact notes into a structured KB update plan.

Purpose: Create a first-pass customer-facing release notes draft from grouped release items and supporting source material.
Notes: Output must be treated as a draft requiring writer validation.

Purpose: Check generated release contents, draft release notes, and KB update plan against the original source material for accuracy, clarity, risk, and validation issues.
Input Sources: Generated Release Contents; AI Draft Release Notes; KB Update Plan; Jira Tickets; Feature Notes; Git Commits; Support Feedback
Notes: Supports the writer validation stage and responsible AI use.
